// about me

Marketing. Coding.
Designing. Writing.

I'm Aditya Sharma, a BCA student at Amity University, Greater Noida (CGPA: 7.04). I thrive at the crossroads of creativity and logic — building responsive UIs, crafting SEO-driven content, and turning data into dashboards.

I completed a Frontend Development Internship at Cognifyz Technologies where I built 10+ responsive web pages and reduced load times by 25%. I'm also an Adobe Certified Marketing Specialist with additional certs from Cisco and IBM.

Experience & Involvement

Frontend Development Intern
Cognifyz Technologies · Remote

  • Resolved 15+ reported UI bugs through debugging, version control (Git), and performance profiling.
